pi_items.source: task.json metadata and verified by setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts which consistently use this name
task.json metadata and verified by verifier.py which checks currentnext >= 900000
task.json metadata and verified by setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts which consistently use this name

iDempiere documentation confirms SOO is the three-letter code for Sales Order Document Base Type in C_DocType.DocBaseType field (Reference 183). Verified via https://wiki.idempiere.org/en/Hackers_Guide_to_Documents and iDempiere API documentation showing SOO maps to C_Order table (class Doc_Order, table ID 259)

iDempiere documentation confirms SO is the two-character code for Standard Order in C_DocType.DocSubTypeSO field. Verified via Document Type Window (ID-135) documentation showing Standard Order as a valid SO Sub Type, and MOrder class constants in GitHub iDempiere repository showing DocSubTypeSO_Standard constant

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on iDempiere GardenWorld demo data. It requires creating a new Sequence named 'Web_Sales_Seq_2025' starting at 900000 and a Document Type named 'Web Standard Order'. The document type uses the standard iDempiere codes: SOO for Sales Order Document Base Type and SO for Standard Order Sub Type. GardenWorld is the standard non-synthetic demo dataset included with iDempiere installations containing sample business data for testing enterprise workflows.
